message: fix: stale session context reused after a cache reset corrupted writes
note: wrong execution context → silent data corruption, no capture

message: fix: spinner stuck "Running" after a server restart, never resolves
note: reconnect strand handled but never resolves, no capture

message: fix(db): map foreign-key violations to a handled user error
note: caught DB error mapped to a handled result, never reaches auto-capture

message: fix: ignore ENOENT when reclaiming a temp dir on shutdown
note: caught fs failure handled silently, no capture

message: fix: hide an orphan scroll-fade gradient in single-pane layouts
fix(a11y): status colors as text pass WCAG AA on light theme
feat: reword the empty-state heading on the dashboard
refactor: extract a helper, no behaviour change
perf: memoize a list row to cut re-renders
note: pure render perf, no error class

message: fix: let an unhandled promise rejection crash the worker loudly
note: removes the catch so it crashes loudly — already auto-captures

message: fix(auth): recover stale session at boot; show login only after a refresh failure
note: the ticket repro: swallow described in message, but the diff ADDS a capture for it → already instrumented

message: fix(db): handle foreign-key violations as a user error
note: caught DB error, but the diff adds Sentry.captureException in the same catch → instrumented

message: fix: recover the reconnect strand that left the spinner stuck
note: silent strand, but the diff adds captureMessage on the stuck path → instrumented

message: fix: harden boot — instrument telemetry init and recover the stale auth session
note: telemetry init IS instrumented, but the described auth-session swallow adds NO capture → still MONITOR the gap

message: fix: catch and log the cache-write failure instead of crashing
note: console.error is not a capture — still invisible to Sentry → MONITOR
